label: PASS
rationale: The prior ReEncryptState was IDLE and the successful ReEncryptRequest Set used START_req; 5.7.3.7.4 says START_req is accepted only from IDLE and changes ReEncryptState to PENDING. The target Get returns PENDING, so it matches the required postcondition.

label: FAIL
rationale: The prior ReEncryptState was IDLE and the successful ReEncryptRequest Set used START_req; 5.7.3.7.4 requires the TPer to change ReEncryptState to PENDING. The target Get still returns IDLE, so it violates the postcondition.

label: PASS
rationale: The prior ReEncryptState was ACTIVE and the successful ReEncryptRequest Set used PAUSE_req; 5.7.3.7.4 says PAUSE_req succeeds from ACTIVE or PENDING, and 5.7.3.7.1 defines the ACTIVE-to-PAUSED transition on PAUSE_req. The target Get returns PAUSED.

label: FAIL
rationale: The prior ReEncryptState was ACTIVE and the successful ReEncryptRequest Set used PAUSE_req; 5.7.3.7.1 and 5.7.3.7.4 require the request to move the state to PAUSED. The target Get returns ACTIVE, leaving the old state in place.

label: PASS
rationale: The prior ReEncryptState was PENDING and the successful ReEncryptRequest Set used PAUSE_req; 5.7.3.7.4 allows PAUSE_req from PENDING, and 5.7.3.7.1 defines the PENDING-to-PAUSED transition. The target Get returns PAUSED.

label: FAIL
rationale: The prior ReEncryptState was PENDING and the successful ReEncryptRequest Set used PAUSE_req; the cited transition rules require the state to become PAUSED. The target Get returns PENDING, so the state did not reflect the successful request.

label: PASS
rationale: The prior ReEncryptState was PAUSED and the successful ReEncryptRequest Set used CONT_req; 5.7.3.7.4 says CONT_req succeeds only from PAUSED and transitions to PENDING. The target Get returns PENDING, so it is compliant.

label: FAIL
rationale: The prior ReEncryptState was PAUSED and the successful ReEncryptRequest Set used CONT_req; 5.7.3.7.4 requires this operation to transition ReEncryptState to PENDING. The target Get returns PAUSED, so it keeps the previous state.

label: PASS
rationale: The prior ReEncryptState was PAUSED and the successful ReEncryptRequest Set used RETIDLE_req; 5.7.3.7.4 says RETIDLE_req is valid only from PAUSED and requests return to IDLE. The target Get returns IDLE.

label: FAIL
rationale: The prior ReEncryptState was PAUSED and the successful ReEncryptRequest Set used RETIDLE_req; 5.7.3.7.4 requires a return to IDLE without moving keys. The target Get returns PAUSED, so the postcondition is not satisfied.
